description: Day-ahead electricity spot price for DE-LU bidding zone
notes: Negative prices possible during high-RES periods

description: aFRR (SRL) positive capacity awarded price — averaged across all 4 German TSOs
notes: Capacity price (not activation price); forward-filled within 4h block

description: Actual Fossil Gas (CCGT/OCGT) generation in DE-LU zone
notes: Includes all gas-fired generation (CCGT + OCGT combined in B04)

description: EU Emissions Trading System (EUA) spot price
notes: EUA = European Union Allowance; 1 EUA = right to emit 1 tonne CO₂

description: THE (Trading Hub Europe) or TTF day-ahead gas price
notes: Thermal MWh; convert from p/therm or $/MMBtu if needed

description: Clean Spark Spread — gross margin from generating 1 MWh electricity

notes: Used for regime context and time-of-day analysis
Weekends typically have lower industrial demand
Captures daily autocorrelation in opportunity costs
Smoothed CSS signal; reduces hourly noise

description: Market regime classification: high / medium / low
